chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Revision Application No.S-19 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 28-02-2025 Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate along with applicant. Syed Sardar Ali Shah, Additional P.G for the State. **** Learned counsel for applicant submits that in view of order dated 06.09.2024, the possession of the disputed land has been handed over to the applicant; therefore, he does not wish to proceed with the matter further and withdraws the same. However, he requests that concerned Mukhtiarkar may be directed to submit fresh report to this Court through Additional Registrar. Order accordingly. Accordingly, instant Crl. Revision Application is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE Ahmad
